documentation.name: genkit
documentation.comment:
WARNING: these APIs are considered unstable and subject to frequent breaking changes that may not honor semver.

Initializes Genkit BETA APIs with a set of options.

This will create a new Genkit registry, register the provided plugins, stores, and other configuration. This
should be called before any flows are registered.

documentation.name: GenkitBeta
documentation.comment: Genkit BETA APIs.

documentation.name: chat
chat
chat
createSession
documentation.comment: Create a session for this environment.

documentation.name: loadSession
documentation.comment: Loads a session from the store.

documentation.name: currentSession
documentation.comment: Gets the current session from async local storage.

documentation.name: defineFormat
defineInterrupt
documentation.comment:
Defines and registers an interrupt.

Interrupts are special tools that halt model processing and return control back to the caller. Interrupts make it simpler to implement
"human-in-the-loop" and out-of-band processing patterns that require waiting on external actions to complete.

documentation.name: generateOperation
defineResource
<anonymous>
documentation.comment:

documentation.name: GenkitOptions
documentation.comment: Options for initializing Genkit.

documentation.name: plugins
documentation.comment: List of plugins to load.

documentation.name: promptDir
documentation.comment: Directory where dotprompts are stored.

documentation.name: model
documentation.comment: Default model to use if no model is specified.

documentation.name: context
documentation.comment: Additional runtime context data for flows and tools.

documentation.name: name
documentation.comment: Display name that will be shown in developer tooling.

documentation.name: clientHeader
documentation.comment: Additional attribution information to include in the x-goog-api-client header.

documentation.name: Genkit
documentation.comment:
`Genkit` encapsulates a single Genkit instance including the {@link Registry}, {@link ReflectionServer}, {@link FlowServer}, and configuration.

Do not instantiate this class directly. Use {@link genkit}.

Registry keeps track of actions, flows, tools, and many other components. Reflection server exposes an API to inspect the registry and trigger executions of actions in the registry. Flow server exposes flows as HTTP endpoints for production use.

There may be multiple Genkit instances in a single codebase.

documentation.name: options
documentation.comment: Developer-configured options.

documentation.name: registry
documentation.comment: Registry instance that is exclusively modified by this Genkit instance.

documentation.name: reflectionServer
documentation.comment: Reflection server for this registry. May be null if not started.

documentation.name: flows
documentation.comment: List of flows that have been registered in this instance.

documentation.name: defineFlow
documentation.comment: Defines and registers a flow function.

documentation.name: defineTool
documentation.comment:
Defines and registers a tool.

Tools can be passed to models by name or value during `generate` calls to be called automatically based on the prompt and situation.

documentation.name: dynamicTool
documentation.comment:
Defines a dynamic tool. Dynamic tools are just like regular tools ({@link Genkit.defineTool}) but will not be registered in the
Genkit registry and can be defined dynamically at runtime.

documentation.name: defineDynamicActionProvider
documentation.comment: Defines and registers a dynamic action provider (e.g. mcp host)

documentation.name: defineSchema
documentation.comment:
Defines and registers a schema from a Zod schema.

Defined schemas can be referenced by `name` in prompts in place of inline schemas.

documentation.name: defineJsonSchema
documentation.comment:
Defines and registers a schema from a JSON schema.

Defined schemas can be referenced by `name` in prompts in place of inline schemas.

documentation.name: defineModel
documentation.comment: Defines a new model and adds it to the registry.

documentation.name: defineModel
documentation.comment: Defines a new model and adds it to the registry.

documentation.name: defineModel
documentation.comment: Defines a new model and adds it to the registry.

documentation.name: defineBackgroundModel
documentation.comment: Defines a new background model and adds it to the registry.

documentation.name: prompt
documentation.comment:
Looks up a prompt by `name` (and optionally `variant`). Can be used to lookup
.prompt files or prompts previously defined with {@link Genkit.definePrompt}

documentation.name: definePrompt
documentation.comment:
Defines and registers a prompt based on a function.

This is an alternative to defining and importing a .prompt file, providing
the most advanced control over how the final request to the model is made.

tags.name: param
tags.comment:
- Prompt metadata including model, model params,
input/output schemas, etc

tags.name: param
deprecated
tags.comment: use `options.messages` with a template string instead.
tags.text: @deprecated use `options.messages` with a template string instead.

documentation.name: defineRetriever
documentation.comment: Creates a retriever action for the provided {@link RetrieverFn} implementation.

documentation.name: defineSimpleRetriever
documentation.comment:
defineSimpleRetriever makes it easy to map existing data into documents that
can be used for prompt augmentation.

tags.name: param
tags.text:
@param options Configuration options for the retriever.
   *

tags.name: param
tags.comment: A function that queries a datastore and returns items from which to extract documents.
tags.text:
@param handler A function that queries a datastore and returns items from which to extract documents.
   *

documentation.name: defineIndexer
documentation.comment: Creates an indexer action for the provided {@link IndexerFn} implementation.

documentation.name: defineEvaluator
documentation.comment: Creates evaluator action for the provided {@link EvaluatorFn} implementation.

documentation.name: defineEmbedder
documentation.comment: Creates embedder model for the provided {@link EmbedderFn} model implementation.

documentation.name: defineHelper
documentation.comment: create a handlebars helper (https://handlebarsjs.com/guide/block-helpers.html) to be used in dotprompt templates.

documentation.name: definePartial
documentation.comment: Creates a handlebars partial (https://handlebarsjs.com/guide/partials.html) to be used in dotprompt templates.

documentation.name: defineReranker
documentation.comment: Creates a reranker action for the provided {@link RerankerFn} implementation.

documentation.name: embed
documentation.comment: Embeds the given `content` using the specified `embedder`.

documentation.name: embedMany
documentation.comment: A veneer for interacting with embedder models in bulk.

documentation.name: evaluate
documentation.comment: Evaluates the given `dataset` using the specified `evaluator`.

documentation.name: rerank
documentation.comment: Reranks documents from a {@link RerankerArgument} based on the provided query.

documentation.name: index
documentation.comment: Indexes `documents` using the provided `indexer`.

documentation.name: retrieve
documentation.comment: Retrieves documents from the `retriever` based on the provided `query`.

documentation.name: generate
generate
generate
generateStream
generateStream
generateStream
checkOperation
run
run
currentContext
documentation.comment:
Returns current action (or flow) invocation context. Can be used to access things like auth
data set by HTTP server frameworks. If invoked outside of an action (e.g. flow or tool) will
return `undefined`.

documentation.name: configure
documentation.comment: Configures the Genkit instance.

documentation.name: stopServers
documentation.comment: Stops all servers.

documentation.name: genkit
documentation.comment:
Initializes Genkit with a set of options.

This will create a new Genkit registry, register the provided plugins, stores, and other configuration. This
should be called before any flows are registered.

documentation.comment:

```ts

```
